questions.question: Peter calls believers what kind of priesthood?
questions.feedback: Believers are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation.

questions.question: Peter says Christ left believers an example so they should follow in his what?
questions.feedback: Christ suffered for you, leaving an example to follow in his steps.

questions.question: Peter describes Christ as the cornerstone that the builders rejected.
questions.feedback: The stone the builders rejected has become the cornerstone.

questions.question: Peter urges believers as foreigners and exiles to abstain from sinful _____ which wage war against the soul.
questions.feedback: Abstain from sinful desires which wage war against your soul.

questions.question: By Christ's _____ you have been healed.
questions.feedback: By his wounds you have been healed.
